To use the 5 percent sample, specify that SAMPLE_GRP equals “01” or “04”. 

To use the 15 percent sample, specify that SAMPLE_GRP equals “15”. 

To use the 20 percent sample, specify that SAMPLE_GRP equals “01”, “04”, or “15”. 

Beneficiaries are assigned to sample groups each year based on the last two digits of their Medicare 
Claim Account Numbers (CANs). Since CANs can change over time (e.g., in the case of remarriage), 
new beneficiaries are becoming eligible for Medicare,
